name: Jerry Seinfeld
abstract: Jerome Allen Seinfeld ( SYNE-feld; born April 29, 1954) is an American stand-up comedian, actor, writer, filmmaker, and television producer specializing in observational comedy. Seinfeld gained stardom playing a fictionalized version of himself in the NBC sitcom Seinfeld (1989–1998), which he co-created and wrote with Larry David.

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Pallo
about_quotes.evidence: He showed up one night... Jerry came in and we got together. He was very nice, a very nice man.
